title: Travel — Advanced & Real-World
topics: visas · accommodation · travel problems · cultural differences
description: Pokročilá cestovatelská angličtina — víza, ubytování, problémy a kulturní rozdíly.

dialogue.speaker: Customer
dialogue.text: I have a booking for tonight — the name is Novák.

dialogue.speaker: Assistant
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, Mr Novák — I'm afraid we're overbooked tonight.

dialogue.speaker: Customer
dialogue.text: That's unacceptable. I confirmed this reservation two weeks ago.

dialogue.speaker: Assistant
dialogue.text: I completely understand, and I sincerely apologise. We've arranged a room at a nearby hotel of equivalent standard at no extra charge.

dialogue.speaker: Customer
dialogue.text: What about my dinner reservation here?

dialogue.speaker: Assistant
dialogue.text: We'll honour that. And we'd like to offer you a complimentary breakfast tomorrow as compensation.

examples.en: Make sure your travel insurance covers medical emergencies abroad.
examples.cz: Ujistěte se, že vaše cestovní pojištění kryje lékařské urgence v zahraničí.

examples.en: The flight was cancelled — we are entitled to compensation.
examples.cz: Let byl zrušen — máme nárok na náhradu.

examples.en: I prefer travelling off the beaten track to popular tourist spots.
examples.cz: Preferuji cestování mimo turistické trasy oproti populárním místům.

examples.en: Check the entry requirements before you travel.
examples.cz: Zkontrolujte si vstupní požadavky před cestou.

quiz.sentence: The hotel was ___booked so we were moved to another one.
I'd like to ___ a claim for my delayed luggage.
Our flight was cancelled — we're ___ to a refund.
Always buy ___ insurance before international travel.

tasks: 1. Write a complaint letter to an airline about a cancelled flight
2. Plan a 5-day itinerary for a trip abroad — write it in English
3. Describe a travel problem you experienced and how it was resolved
